//: Example ~/.claude/settings.json fragment for prompt-relay. Merge into your own settings; do not clobber — this is one combined example covering BOTH hooks (hooks/README.md and logger/README.md each showed a separate 'hooks' fragment before; pasting both naively would clobber one with the other since JSON object keys don't merge that way).
//model: Pin your lead model so the choice survives context resets and the harness doesn't silently fall back to another model mid-session. Set to whatever you drive the lead with.
//permissions: Optional. If a runaway sub-agent swarm has ever drained your usage, you can hard-cap spawning. Leave this out unless you want the brake.

permissions.//deny-example: Uncomment to forbid sub-agent spawning entirely (single-model mode).

//hooks: Combined fragment for both prompt-relay hooks — pre-commit-checklist.sh (PreToolUse on Bash) and log-delegation.sh (SubagentStop). Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/prompt-relay with your actual clone path.
